epic.title: v3-refactor
epic.description: Refactor Bloodbank into the v3 event platform: Dapr runtime, NATS JetStream broker, CloudEvents immutable event envelope, separate command envelope, AsyncAPI/Holyfields contract source of truth, EventCatalog discovery, Apicurio schema registry, Docker Compose self-hosted deployment, and operator-focused Bloodbank CLI.
acceptance_criteria: v3 platform scaffold exists in Bloodbank.
Holyfields base contract work is tracked separately and linked.
One reference vertical slice can publish and consume through the v3 platform.
Old v2 publish paths have a documented retirement plan.

tickets.title: Sync Bloodbank submodule baseline
tickets.description: Create a clean branch and record the Bloodbank submodule baseline for v3 work.
acceptance_criteria: Branch is v3-refactor.
The ticket links to v3-implementation-plan.md.
No legacy cleanup deletions were reverted.

tickets.title: Create v3 Compose scaffold
tickets.description: Create compose/v3 with the Docker Compose platform scaffold for Dapr, NATS, Apicurio, and EventCatalog.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose -f compose/v3/docker-compose.yml config parses.
The Compose file defines nats, dapr-placement, apicurio-registry, and eventcatalog services.
The scaffold does not depend on current v2 RabbitMQ services.

tickets.title: Add Dapr component manifests
tickets.description: Create static Dapr component manifests for pub/sub, state, and secrets.
acceptance_criteria: The pub/sub manifest targets NATS.
The manifests use placeholder-safe local values only.
The manifests are documented in compose/v3/README.md.

tickets.title: Define NATS JetStream topology
tickets.description: Define stream names, subjects, retention notes, and replay posture for Bloodbank v3.
acceptance_criteria: The topology matches this plan's naming rules.
The README explains replay and dead-letter assumptions.
The topology is not coupled to RabbitMQ.

tickets.title: Add operator CLI v3 skeleton
tickets.description: Create a safe cli/v3 skeleton with static doctor, trace, replay, and emit command stubs.
acceptance_criteria: python -m compileall cli/v3 passes.
python cli/v3/bb_v3.py doctor exits successfully when scaffold files exist.
The CLI does not publish network traffic.

tickets.title: Add platform bootstrap check
tickets.description: Create a static ops/v3/bootstrap check that validates the scaffold without Docker or network access.
acceptance_criteria: bash ops/v3/bootstrap/check-platform.sh passes after scaffold files exist.
The script does not require Docker, Dapr, NATS, or network access.
Missing files produce actionable error messages.

tickets.title: Add replay and trace docs
tickets.description: Document operator replay and trace workflows before implementing production replay.
acceptance_criteria: The docs explain what data is safe to replay.
The docs explain that replays preserve original IDs and add replay metadata.
The docs do not claim production replay is implemented yet.

tickets.title: Add adapter migration scaffolds
tickets.description: Prepare adapter migration directories for hookd, OpenClaw, and infra_dispatcher.
acceptance_criteria: Each adapter README names the current v2 component it will replace.
Each adapter README names the target v3 publish path.
No adapter contains executable migration code yet.

tickets.title: Link the implementation plan from architecture docs
tickets.description: Make v3-implementation-plan.md discoverable from README and architecture docs.
acceptance_criteria: All links resolve locally.
The v2 GOD.md remains clearly marked as legacy/current-state context.

tickets.title: Create Holyfields contract work tracker
tickets.description: Document the sibling-repo Holyfields work required by the Bloodbank v3 migration.
acceptance_criteria: No Holyfields code is edited in the Bloodbank submodule.
Bloodbank tickets clearly identify which work is blocked on Holyfields.

tickets.title: Verify first scaffold wave
tickets.description: Run the documented static checks and inspect results before marking the scaffold wave complete.
acceptance_criteria: Static checks pass.
Any skipped Docker check is documented with the reason.
Ticket completion is blocked until spec review and code quality review pass.
